title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Samsung India Electronics has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
